articles.title_en: Finland to Tighten Curbs on Medical Equipment Exports to Russia
articles.lead_en: “We have now become aware that medical and pharmaceutical products may end up being used in Russia for military purposes,” the head of sanctions at Finland’s Foreign Ministry said.
articles.title_raw: Finland to Tighten Curbs on Medical Equipment Exports to Russia
articles.lead_raw: “We have now become aware that medical and pharmaceutical products may end up being used in Russia for military purposes,” the head of sanctions at Finland’s Foreign Ministry said.

articles.title_en: Aksakov: the dollar exchange rate should not exceed 80 rubles for the development of the Russian economy
articles.lead_en: First of all, this is necessary to support domestic producers, noted the Chairman of the State Duma Committee on the Financial Market
articles.title_raw: Аксаков: курс доллара не должен превышать 80 рублей для развития экономики РФ
articles.lead_raw: Прежде всего это необходимо для поддержки внутреннего производителя, отметил председатель комитета Госдумы по финансовому рынку

articles.title_en: Income growth, unemployment and inflation. Forecast of the Ministry of Economic Development
articles.lead_en: The growth rate of Russia's GDP by 2029 may be 2.4% in annual terms
articles.title_raw: Рост доходов населения, безработица и инфляция. Прогноз Минэкономразвития
articles.lead_raw: Темп роста ВВП России к 2029 году может составить 2,4% в годовом выражении

articles.title_en: Russia cuts 2026 GDP growth forecast to 0.4% from 1.3%
articles.lead_en: Russia’s government has sharply revised down its economic growth forecast for 2026. Deputy Prime Minister Alexander Novak now says the economy is expected to grow just 0.4 percent — down from the 1.3 percent the Economic Development Ministry projected in September.
articles.title_raw: Russia cuts 2026 GDP growth forecast to 0.4% from 1.3%
articles.lead_raw: Russia’s government has sharply revised down its economic growth forecast for 2026. Deputy Prime Minister Alexander Novak now says the economy is expected to grow just 0.4 percent — down from the 1.3 percent the Economic Development Ministry projected in September.

articles.title_en: Trade turnover in EAEU exceeds $95 bln in 2025 — Russian Deputy Foreign Minister Galuzin
articles.lead_en: Mikhail Galuzin said that foreign countries are paying attention to positive results of Eurasian economic integration and are striving to become partners of the EAEU

articles.title_en: The Russian stock market shows a decline at the beginning of the main trading session
articles.lead_en: The yuan to ruble exchange rate at the opening of trading on the Moscow Exchange increased by 2.2 kopecks
articles.title_raw: Российский рынок акций в начале основной торговой сессии демонстрирует снижение
articles.lead_raw: Курс юаня к рублю на открытии торгов Московской биржи вырос на 2,2 копейки

articles.title_en: Economist Guliyev: the UAE’s exit from OPEC increases the importance of the OPEC+ format for Russia
articles.lead_en: The dean of the Faculty of Financial Economics at MGIMO believes that the Russian Federation will rely less on strict collective restrictions and more on flexible coordination of production parameters and market signals with partners
articles.title_raw: Экономист Гулиев: выход ОАЭ из ОПЕК повышает значимость формата ОПЕК+ для России
articles.lead_raw: Декан факультета финансовой экономики МГИМО считает, что РФ будет в меньшей степени опираться на жесткие коллективные ограничения и в большей - на гибкое согласование параметров добычи и рыночных сигналов с партнерами

articles.title_en: Novak pointed to significant structural challenges in the economy
articles.lead_en: According to the Deputy Prime Minister of the Russian Federation, a structural shortage of personnel and a limited labor market remain
articles.title_raw: Новак указал на значимые структурные вызовы в экономике
articles.lead_raw: По словам вице-премьера РФ, сохраняется структурный дефицит кадров и ограниченность рынка труда

articles.title_en: Novak: oil prices could fall sharply if the energy crisis drags on
articles.lead_en: The Deputy Prime Minister stressed that Russia does not consider the energy crisis as an additional source for solving budgetary and macroeconomic problems
articles.title_raw: Новак: цены на нефть могут сильно упасть, если энергокризис затянется
articles.lead_raw: Вице-премьер подчеркнул, что Россия не рассматривает энергокризис как дополнительный источник для решения бюджетных и макроэкономических задач

articles.title_en: Novak: The Russian Federation does not consider the energy crisis as a source of solving budget problems
articles.lead_en: The Deputy Prime Minister explained that at the same time, additional inflation risks arise through the transfer of rising world prices to the domestic market
articles.title_raw: Новак: РФ не рассматривает энергокризис как источник решения бюджетных задач
articles.lead_raw: Вице-премьер пояснил, что одновременно возникают дополнительные инфляционные риски через перенос роста мировых цен на внутренний рынок

articles.title_en: Republika Srpska will never join sanctions against Russia — president
articles.lead_en: Sinisa Karan says the path to the EU cannot be based on "political and economic means to pressure the independent policies"
